category_sources: source_facts.description says SNOBOL4 is a string-oriented symbolic programming language; official CSNOBOL4 page describes a full SNOBOL4 implementation.
display_name_sources: Official regressive.org release page labels the implementation CSNOBOL4.
docs_sources: Official regressive.org CSNOBOL4 page lists manual pages, SNOBOL4 manuals, and SNOBOL4 books.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official regressive.org pages provide downloads/manuals but no official source-control repository URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official CSNOBOL4 page describe a SNOBOL4 language implementation with interpreter/manual pages.
